payload.description: Move PreToolUse gate in-process; delete UDS RPC; demote daemon to optional observer host; rename daemon CLI→observe; F8 block suggestion (F7+F8). Redeclared from 2026-07-03-gate-in-process-daemon-demotion to add README.md to scope (under-scoped derived doc).

payload.reason: Content reviewed over 3 rounds (Claude subagent + codex exec) to convergence; this redeclare only adds README.md to scope (missed derived doc).

Two-actor code review (Claude subagent + codex exec --sandbox read-only); 3 findings found + fixed (LOCK_SH liveness, unified spawn wait, partial-start cleanup) + mypy + README scope; gate/decision plane verified correct + policy tables byte-identical.

checklist.note: Implements the 3-round-reviewed plan. Decision plane in-process (core/state_snapshot.py single seam then pure PreToolUseGate); hook_entry._decide returns (decision, reason, suggested_action) with F8 block-message suggestion across all three shims; gate check CLI routed through load_state_snapshot. UDS RPC layer (client/protocol/hot_state/_uds_path) deleted; daemon demoted to observer host (server.run_observer_host; supervisor flock liveness + sysconfig absolute-path spawn); daemon CLI renamed to observe. Policy tables byte-identical (Claude reviewer verified) - no gate-decision behavior change.

All changed files within declared scope; redeclared as -v2 to add README.md after the original under-scoped that derived doc; incidental tests/e2e/__init__.py edit reverted. review prepare reports out_of_scope=[]. private/specs edits are gitignored (never in the git diff). Attestation is the remaining scope entry.

Two-actor code review (Claude subagent + codex exec) found 3 real bugs the green suite missed, all fixed + re-verified. BLOCKER: supervisor.is_running probed with LOCK_EX - concurrent probe PROCESSES conflict with each other on a stale/unheld pidfile, false running, observe start no-ops, host never comes up; fixed to LOCK_SH (0/200 false positives across processes vs 170/200 with LOCK_EX). ensure_running fast path could return 0 from a half-written pidfile; unified both paths through poll-until-pid>0. run_observer_host leaked partially-started observers on start error; now stops manager on the error path. Also hardened active_change.read_active_change_id. mypy fixed. ruff clean, import-linter KEPT.

load_state_snapshot fuzzed never-raises across the full corrupt-input matrix (non-UTF-8, corrupt YAML, non-mapping, unhashable/int/dict current_state on recency AND override paths, extra-key/missing-field, unknown override); cid-before-try preserves resolved change_id in the fallback; isinstance(current_state,str) guard blocks a non-str reaching decide. Tests non-vacuous: addaudithook asserts a read WAS observed; stale-pidfile test fails with LOCK_EX passes with LOCK_SH; concurrent-starts proves single-instance via identical PIDs; run_observer_host fail-safe idle test. Full suite 1608 passed.

daemon to observe surface renamed across getting-started, ARCHITECTURE, adapters/claude-code, cli-reference (auto-regen), README, private/specs. AGENTS.md regenerated via sync --agents-md; sync --check clean. d-single-gate-policy re-ratified for the single in-process reader; decision check clean. daemon-architecture spec superseded. doc check clean (README AF_UNIX dead-ref resolved). gitignore managed block unchanged.
